favo: Try to build some CRIT Rate if using this weapon to trigger the passive consistently
cr-favo: Only recommended if using a **Favonius** weapon
4vv-p45: **Anemo characters can be extremely good at buffing Pyro/Electro/Cryo/Hydro with Viridescent Venerer (4) artifact set. It is recommended to spend minimal resin to give your anemo support a cheap 4pc set (regardless of the stats) if it helps your team.**
